icon.label: Icon
icon.desc: Adjust the base and hover size of taskbar app icons.

layout.label: Layout
layout.desc: Control title visibility, taskbar width, and spacing between app entries.

typography.label: Title Typography
typography.desc: Customize the font used for visible taskbar titles.

itemColors.label: Item Colors
itemColors.desc: Change taskbar entry background, border, and text colors for each state.

grouping.label: Grouping
grouping.desc: Configure app grouping and workspace grouping behavior for the taskbar.

workspaceContainers.label: Workspace Containers
workspaceContainers.desc: Sort windows into workspace-based sections and configure separator labels and dividers.

applicationGrouping.label: Application Grouping
applicationGrouping.desc: Aggregate multiple windows from the same app into a single taskbar entry.

geometry.label: Geometry
geometry.desc: Define the spatial footprint of taskbar items and gaps between them.

animation.label: Animation
animation.desc: Tune the delayed focus-travel marker that slides between focused taskbar entries.

animationTiming.label: Timing
animationTiming.desc: Control when and how fast the focus animation plays.

animationStyle.label: Style
animationStyle.desc: Choose the motion style and adjust the visual size of all animation elements.

animationColors.label: Colors
animationColors.desc: Pick the color palette used by the focus animation layers.

animationEffects.label: Effects
animationEffects.desc: Adjust the blur softness and overall transparency of all animation elements.

title.label: Title
title.desc: Configure title visibility, width, and automatic smart sizing.

hideMode.label: Visibility mode
hideMode.desc: Choose how the taskbar behaves when there are no windows or pinned apps.

onlySameOutput.label: Only same monitor
onlySameOutput.desc: Only show windows that belong to the current monitor.

onlyActiveWorkspaces.label: Only active workspaces
onlyActiveWorkspaces.desc: Only show windows from currently active workspaces.

colorizeIcons.label: Colorize icons
colorizeIcons.desc: Apply the themed icon tint to match the shell color scheme.

showPinnedApps.label: Show pinned apps
showPinnedApps.desc: Keep pinned applications visible even when they are not running.

iconScale.label: Icon scale
iconScale.desc: Scale the icon size inside each taskbar entry.

hoverIconScaleMultiplier.label: Hover icon size
hoverIconScaleMultiplier.desc: Multiplier applied to icon size while hovering a taskbar item.

hoverItemScalePercent.label: Hover item size
hoverItemScalePercent.desc: Additional size increase applied to the entire item while hovering.

showTitle.label: Show titles
showTitle.desc: Display window titles next to icons on horizontal bars.
showTitle.descDisabled: Titles are only available on horizontal bars.

titleWidth.label: Title width
titleWidth.desc: Maximum pixel width for each visible title.

smartWidth.label: Smart width
smartWidth.desc: Automatically shrink title width when the taskbar would exceed its maximum.

maxTaskbarWidth.label: Max taskbar width
maxTaskbarWidth.desc: Maximum percentage of bar width the taskbar may occupy.

focusTransitionEnabled.label: Directional focus animation
focusTransitionEnabled.desc: Slide a compact accent marker from the previously focused entry to the newly focused one.

focusTransitionPreview.label: Live preview
focusTransitionPreview.desc: Placeholder taskbar items loop the current focus animation settings indefinitely.

focusTransitionDelayMs.label: Focus animation delay
focusTransitionDelayMs.desc: Wait time before the focus-travel marker begins moving.

focusTransitionDurationMs.label: Focus animation duration
focusTransitionDurationMs.desc: Travel time for the focus-travel marker between taskbar entries.

focusTransitionStyle.label: Focus animation style
focusTransitionStyle.desc: Choose which motion style the focus-travel overlay uses.

focusTransitionIntensity.label: Focus animation intensity
focusTransitionIntensity.desc: Adjust how strong the style's glow, stretch, or bounce effects feel.

focusTransitionScale.label: Element scale
focusTransitionScale.desc: Scale the size of all focus animation elements uniformly.

focusTransitionLeadColor.label: Lead color
focusTransitionLeadColor.desc: Primary color used for the moving focus marker.

focusTransitionGlowColor.label: Glow color
focusTransitionGlowColor.desc: Color used for the marker's trail, glow, and landing bloom.

focusTransitionBlur.label: Blur
focusTransitionBlur.desc: Increase the softness and spread of all animation elements.

focusTransitionTransparency.label: Transparency
focusTransitionTransparency.desc: Reduce the opacity of all animation elements.

focusTransitionEffectColor.label: Effect color
focusTransitionEffectColor.desc: A third color blended into the focus animation for extra depth.

focusTransitionVerticalPosition.label: Focus marker position
focusTransitionVerticalPosition.desc: Vertical placement of the focus marker on horizontal bars.

titleFontFamily.label: Title font family
titleFontFamily.desc: Font used for taskbar title text.

titleFontScale.label: Title font scale
titleFontScale.desc: Scale the title font relative to the bar's base font size.

titleFontWeight.label: Title font weight
titleFontWeight.desc: Font weight for taskbar title text.

background.label: Background color
background.desc: Select the background color for this taskbar item state.

border.label: Border color
border.desc: Select the border color for this taskbar item state.

text.label: Text color
text.desc: Select the title text color for this taskbar item state.

default.label: Default
default.desc: Used for running items that are not hovered or focused.

hovered.label: Hovered
hovered.desc: Used while the pointer is over a taskbar item.

focused.label: Focused
focused.desc: Used for the currently focused app.

inactive.label: Inactive
inactive.desc: Used for pinned items that are visible but not running.

groupApps.label: Group apps
groupApps.desc: Collapse multiple windows of the same app into a single taskbar entry.

groupClickAction.label: Grouped left click
groupClickAction.desc: Whether left-click on a grouped entry cycles windows or opens a list.

groupContextMenuMode.label: Grouped context menu
groupContextMenuMode.desc: Whether right-click on a grouped entry shows the window list or the full menu.

groupIndicatorStyle.label: Grouped indicator style
groupIndicatorStyle.desc: Visual indicator showing the number of windows in a grouped entry.

groupByWorkspaceIndex.label: Group all activity by workspace
groupByWorkspaceIndex.desc: When showing all workspaces, sort entries into sections by workspace index.

showWorkspaceSeparators.label: Show workspace separators
showWorkspaceSeparators.desc: Insert visual separators between workspace groups in the all-activity view.

workspaceSeparatorShowLabel.label: Show workspace label
workspaceSeparatorShowLabel.desc: Display the workspace index text on each separator.

workspaceSeparatorShowDivider.label: Show workspace divider
workspaceSeparatorShowDivider.desc: Display a themed divider line alongside each workspace label.

workspaceSeparatorPrefix.label: Workspace label prefix
workspaceSeparatorPrefix.desc: Text prepended to the workspace index on each separator.

workspaceSeparatorSuffix.label: Workspace label suffix
workspaceSeparatorSuffix.desc: Text appended after the workspace index on each separator.

workspaceSeparatorShowForFirst.label: Show separator before first workspace
workspaceSeparatorShowForFirst.desc: Display a separator before the first workspace group.

workspaceSeparatorDividerMode.label: Separator style
workspaceSeparatorDividerMode.desc: Choose the visual style used for workspace separators.

workspaceSeparatorDividerChar.label: Separator character
workspaceSeparatorDividerChar.desc: Custom character used as the workspace divider when style is set to character.

workspaceSeparatorDividerIcon.label: Separator icon
workspaceSeparatorDividerIcon.desc: Custom icon used as the workspace divider when style is set to icon.
